Balancing ​

12.3.A Current balancing state [GL EB] ​

GET /balancing/12-3-a-current-balancing-state-gl-eb

12.3.A Current balancing state [GL EB]​

GET
/balancing/12-3-a-current-balancing-state-gl-eb

Request limit: Each request may cover a period of up to 100 days.

Authorizations​

SecurityToken
Type
API Key (query: securityToken)

Parameters​

Query Parameters

documentType*

A86 = Imbalance volume

Type
string
Required
Example"A86"
businessType*

B33 = Area Control Error

Type
string
Required
Example"B33"
area_Domain*

EIC code of a Scheduling Area

Type
string
Required
Example"10YHU-MAVIR----U"
periodStart*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000

Type
integer
Required
Example"202405292200"
periodEnd*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000

Type
integer
Required
Example"202405302200"

Responses​

Successful response

application/xml
XML

Playground​

Authorization
Variables
Key
Value

Samples​

Powered by VitePress OpenAPI

12.3.B&C Balancing energy bids ​

GET /balancing/12-3-b-c-balancing-energy-bids

12.3.B&C Balancing energy bids​

GET
/balancing/12-3-b-c-balancing-energy-bids

Request limit: Each request may cover a period of up to 1 year.

Response limit: A maximum of 100 TimeSeries elements in total, counted across all XML documents contained in the ZIP response. The offsetparameter can be used to retrieve the data in batches of up to 100 TimeSeries, where offset=0 returns the first 100 elements, offset=100 returns the next 100, and so on.

Authorizations​

SecurityToken
Type
API Key (query: securityToken)

Parameters​

Query Parameters

documentType*

A37 = Reserve bid document

Type
string
Required
Example"A37"
businessType*

B74 = Offer

Type
string
Required
Example"B74"
processType*

A46 = Replacement reserve; A47 = Manual frequency restoration reserve; A51 = Automatic frequency restoration reserve

Type
string
Required
Example"A47"
connecting_Domain*

EIC code of a Scheduling Area

Type
string
Required
Example"10YBE----------2"
periodStart*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000. Note data is archived after 93 days of retention period. Therefore the requested date should be within the retention period.

Type
integer
Required
Example"202310072200"
periodEnd*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000. Note data is archived after 93 days of retention period. Therefore the requested date should be within the retention period.

Type
integer
Required
Example"202310082200"
offset

Integer: Zero‑based index of the first TimeSeries to return. The offset parameter paginates the response in batches of 100 TimeSeries (e.g., offset = n returns the TimeSeries in the range n+1 to n+100).

Type
integer
Example"1000"
Standard_MarketProduct

A01 = Standard; A05 = Standard mFRR scheduled activation; A07 = Standard mFRR direct activation

Type
string
Example"A01"
Original_MarketProduct

A02 = Specific; A03 = Integrated Process; A04 = Local

Type
string
Example"A02"
Direction

A01 = Up; A02 = Down

Type
string
Example"A01"

Responses​

Successful response

application/xml
XML

Playground​

Authorization
Variables
Key
Value

Samples​

Powered by VitePress OpenAPI

12.3.B&C Balancing energy bids archives ​

GET /balancing/12-3-b-c-balancing-energy-bids-archives

12.3.B&C Balancing energy bids archives​

GET
/balancing/12-3-b-c-balancing-energy-bids-archives

Request limit: Each request may cover a period of up to 1 year.

Response limit: A maximum of 100 ZIP files contained in the ZIP response. The offsetparameter can be used to retrieve the data in batches of up to 100 ZIP archives, whereoffset=0 returns the first 100 archives, offset=100 returns the next 100, and so on.

Authorizations​

SecurityToken
Type
API Key (query: securityToken)

Parameters​

Query Parameters

documentType*

A37 = Reserve bid document

Type
string
Required
Example"A37"
businessType*

B74 = Offer

Type
string
Required
Example"B74"
processType*

A46 = Replacement reserve; A47 = Manual frequency restoration reserve; A51 = Automatic frequency restoration reserve.

Type
string
Required
Example"A47"
connecting_Domain*

EIC code of a Scheduling Area

Type
string
Required
Example"10YBE----------2"
periodStart*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000. Note data is archived after 93 days of retention period. Therefore the requested period should not be within the retention period.

Type
integer
Required
Example"202310072200"
periodEnd*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000. Note data is archived after 93 days of retention period. Therefore the requested period should not be within the retention period.

Type
integer
Required
Example"202310082200"
storageType*

Used to request archives

Type
string
Required
Example"archive "
offset

Integer: Zero‑based index of the first archive to return. The offset parameter paginates the response in batches of 100 archives (e.g., offset = n returns the archives in the range n+1 to n+100).

Type
integer
Example"0"

Responses​

Successful response

application/xml
XML

Playground​

Authorization
Variables
Key
Value

Samples​

Powered by VitePress OpenAPI

Type
string
Required
Example"A51"
area_Domain*

EIC code of a Scheduling Area

Type
string
Required
Example"10YAT-APG------L"
periodStart*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000

Type
integer
Required
Example"202309022200"
periodEnd*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000

Type
integer
Required
Example"202309032200"

12.3.F Procured balancing capacity (GL EB) ​

GET /balancing/12-3-f-procured-balancing-capacity-gl-eb

12.3.F Procured balancing capacity (GL EB)​

GET
/balancing/12-3-f-procured-balancing-capacity-gl-eb

Request limit: Each request may cover a period of up to 1 year.

Response limit: A maximum of 100 TimeSeries elements in total, counted across all XML documents contained in the ZIP response. The offsetparameter can be used to retrieve the data in batches of up to 100 TimeSeries, where offset=0 returns the first 100 elements, offset=100 returns the next 100, and so on.

Authorizations​

SecurityToken
Type
API Key (query: securityToken)

Parameters​

Query Parameters

documentType*

A15 = Acquiring system operator reserve schedule

Type
string
Required
Example"A15"
processType*

A46 = Replacement reserve; A47 = Manual frequency restoration reserve; A51 = Automatic frequency restoration reserve; A52 = Frequency containment reserve

Type
string
Required
Example"A51"
area_Domain*

Scheduling Area

Type
string
Required
Example"10YDE-VE-------2"
periodStart*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000

Type
integer
Required
Example"202306150000"
periodEnd

[M ]Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000 (IMPOTANT NOTE: Minimum time interval in query response ranges from part of day to year, depending on selected Type_MarketAgreement.Type. Minimum is 1 hour for this data item.)

Type
integer
Example"202306150100"
offset

Integer: Zero‑based index of the first TimeSeries to return. The offset parameter paginates the response in batches of 100 TimeSeries (e.g., offset = n returns the TimeSeries in the range n+1 to n+100).

Type
integer
Example"0"
Type_MarketAgreement.Type

A01 = Daily; A02 = Weekly; A03 = Monthly; A04 = Yearly; A05 = Total; A06 = Long term; A07 = Intraday; A13 = Hourly

Type
string
Example"A01"

Responses​

Successful response

application/xml
XML

Authorization
Variables
Key
Value

12.3.H&I Allocation and use of cross-zonal balancing capacity ​

GET /balancing/12-3-h-i-allocation-and-use-of-cross-zonal-balancing-capacity

12.3.H&I Allocation and use of cross-zonal balancing capacity​

GET
/balancing/12-3-h-i-allocation-and-use-of-cross-zonal-balancing-capacity

Request limit: Each request may cover a period of up to 1 year.

Response limit: A maximum of 100 instances contained in the ZIP response. One instance can be split into up to 8 TimeSeries. The total number of files in the ZIP file is variable and depends on the values of the dividing elements - allocation decision time, domain.mRID, etc.

Authorizations​

SecurityToken
Type
API Key (query: securityToken)

Parameters​

Query Parameters

documentType*

A38 = Reserve allocation result document

Type
string
Required
Example"A38"
processType*

A46 = Replacement reserve; A47 = Manual frequency restoration reserve; A51 = Automatic frequency restoration reserve; A52 = Frequency containment reserve

Type
string
Required
Example"A51"
Connecting_Domain*

EIC code of a Bidding Zone

Type
string
Required
Example"10Y1001A1001A47J"
Acquiring_Domain*

EIC code of a Bidding Zone

Type
string
Required
Example"10YDK-2--------M"
periodStart*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000

Type
integer
Required
Example"202306150000"
periodEnd*

Pattern yyyyMMddHHmm e.g. 201601010000

Type
integer
Required
Example"202306152200"
Type_MarketAgreement.Type

A01 = Daily; A02 = Weekly; A06 = Long term

Type
string
Example"A01"

Responses​

Successful response

application/xml
XML

offset

Integer: Zero‑based index of the first TimeSeries to return. The offset parameter paginates the response in batches of 100 TimeSeries (e.g., offset = n returns the TimeSeries in the range n+1 to n+100).

Example"202212310000"

integer
Example"202305010000"
offset
